title: Can TinaCMS Edit Site-Wide Design Visually?
excerpt: TinaCMS is content-first, not a full visual design system manager. Here is a practical pattern for global visual editing using a Tina-managed theme config.
seoTitle: TinaCMS Global Visual Theme Editing Guide | GenFix Blog
seoDescription: Learn TinaCMS limitations for global design control and how to implement a practical site-wide theme editor for colors, spacing, typography, and variants.

author.name: GenFix Editorial Team
author.bio: GenFix specialists in temporary power, generator servicing, and backup system planning for Australian sites.
